prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via Garrett GT2259S turbocharger (OEM EA211 1.0 TSI CHZB engine code) with custom 266-degree camshafts from Schrick, supporting 280+ hp on E85 fuel with a bespoke APR Stage 3+ ECU calibration and upgraded fuel system including Bosch 350 LPH high-flow fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors

Full AP Racing 4-piston CP8370 front brake kit with 280mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom Tilton 75-series hydraulic handbrake for rally-inspired braking and drift control, along with a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel and uprated clutch assembly for rapid gear shifts

Custom KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with adjustable rebound, compression, and ride height, featuring 8-position adjustable damping and spherical top mounts, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars, and polybushings from SuperPro for razor-sharp chassis response
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny VW Up GTI widebody kit (Pandem Works) with carbon fiber fenders, extended front splitter, and rear diffuser, including custom 3D-printed rear quarter panels to accommodate 18x8.5 ET15 BBS RS-GT wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (215/40 R18)

Custom carbon fiber roof panel from Seibon Carbon with integrated roof scoop for improved airflow to the intercooler, paired with a custom front-mounted GReddy intercooler with a 50mm core and integrated water spray system for sustained power delivery

Full OMP carbon fiber interior overhaul including Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel with quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay with integrated AIM MXS Strada digital dash for real-time telemetry
